steps.title: Check current netdata setup
steps.description:
Verify your netdata version and configuration:
```bash
netdata -v
```
This feature requires a working netdata installation.

steps.title: Review netdata configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant netdata configuration:
I would like to request support for [TimescaleDB](http://www.timescale.com/index.html) as netdata backend, which is an extension on top of Postgres. Thanks!

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Feature]TimescaleDB support

 — I think this covers what we

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "[Feature]TimescaleDB support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
##### Summary

This PR updates the main `README.md` file to mention TimescaleDB more explicitly. It also adds a new page at `backends/TIMESCALE.md` to explain how the connection works, with links to 's program, 's setup, and the blog post on the TimescaleDB website.

 — I think this covers what we mentioned on our call a while back. If not, please let me know.
